metadata.election: June 2, 2026, Consolidated Statewide Direct Primary Election
metadata.coordinates: geocoded from the official street address (Nominatim); locations approximate
metadata.note: Hand-transcribed from SF Department of Elections pages. Refresh each election. The drop-box list and addresses are from the official June 2, 2026 Voter Information Pamphlet (doc 38-EN-J26-CP5); the same 37 sites appear on the Department's official 'Ballot Drop Box Locations' map linked from sf.gov/return-your-ballot as of 2026-07-18, which describes them in recurring terms ('the City's 37 official drop boxes', open beginning 29 days before Election Day). No list labeled for the November 3, 2026 election had been published as of retrieval. Every Nominatim coordinate was cross-checked to within 0.17 mi of the Department's own map placemark for the same site.
